title: CSD Predictive Independence Ablation: Do Ecological Indicators Carry Signal Beyond Difficulty Position?
summary: Demo notebook running a 5-ablation study testing whether CSD ecological indicators carry predictive signal beyond difficulty position. Uses 100 examples from the csd_features_unified dataset across 5 model-task pairs. Evaluates 3 classifiers (LogReg/RF/SVM) x 3 CV schemes (LOPO/LOTO/LOMO) with 500-bootstrap CIs and 50-iteration permutation test. Key findings: CSD contribution ratio ~0.24 (modest unique signal), pure CSD F1 ~0.70 beats random (0.47), difficulty-only F1 ~0.84 is strong, dynamics add meaningful lift. Produces grouped bar chart of ablation F1s and horizontal bar chart of marginal CSD feature contributions.
